ljmds 0.0.1

Package index

All functions

ljmds.animate()
Animated visualisation of the configuration map
ljmds.pipeline()
Local Jaccard MDS pipeline at fixed (h, k)
ljmds.read.csv()
Read a longitudinal binary keyword corpus
ljmds.select()
Joint (h, k) selection by functional Rousseeuw silhouette
ljmds.silhouette() ljmds.silhouette.per.keyword()
Rousseeuw silhouette in functional L2 space
ljmds_data
Built-in example datasets
plot(<ljmds>) plot(<ljmds.sel>)
Plot methods for ljmds objects
